decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes 2018-2025 longitudinal sentinel laboratory surveillance data to describe ceftriaxone-resistant gonorrhoea cases and trends in Singapore.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of sentinel surveillance for descriptive epidemiology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares sentinel measles surveillance with mandatory notifications and insurance claims and finds underestimation of adult cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly evaluates bias in estimates produced by a sentinel surveillance system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares sentinel-network attack-rate estimates with telephone-survey and hospital-surveillance estimates and identifies underestimation in Guadeloupe.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparison diagnoses incidence-estimation bias in sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly criticizes Mexico's sentinel model, quantifies unreported COVID-19 cases and deaths using Rt, and concludes that the model loses substantial information.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Quantifies underreporting and information loss in a sentinel surveillance model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses influenza positivity from SARI sentinel surveillance together with hospitalization totals to estimate influenza-associated admission burdens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of sentinel data to estimate infectious-disease hospitalization burden.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a nowcasting model to correct sentinel surveillance underestimation of total cases and overestimation of severe cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development paper proposing a model to improve sentinel incidence estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits simulated epidemics to Italian sentinel surveillance estimates and derives an influenza-surveillance underreporting factor of 3.3-3.7.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pandemic-model calibration using sentinel surveillance observations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses antenatal-clinic sentinel surveillance data as inputs to EPP and Spectrum for Jamaica's national HIV estimates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV estimation application incorporating sentinel surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses and compares modeled ANC sentinel and routine VCT data to estimate HIV prevalence magnitude and trends in Addis Ababa.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV inference application using sentinel surveillance estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a general statistical framework coupling a transmission model with an explicit model of the sentinel reporting process.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological paper developing a framework for inference from sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses repeated sentinel surveys and specified prevalence-confidence criteria to infer absence of bluetongue-virus circulation and estimate seroprevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete veterinary infectious-disease inference from sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel ILI detections plus assumptions about network coverage and care seeking to extrapolate symptomatic H7N9 case-fatality risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease severity inference calibrated from sentinel data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks national sentinel influenza estimates against nearly comprehensive electronic claims and finds the sentinel estimate approximately twice as high.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of sentinel-derived national patient estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Formally evaluates whether a campylobacteriosis sentinel site represents national demographic, epidemiological, and pathogen-genotype variation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Assesses the representativeness needed for inference from a sentinel site.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Formulates and compares incidence estimators that use external GP-density information to reduce selection-related bias in sentinel networks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development supported by simulations and application to the Sentinelles network.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares prefectural influenza variation from sentinel surveillance against national electronic claims and quantifies their limited correlation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Benchmarks the precision of regional inference from sentinel data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies ratio estimation with outpatient counts as auxiliary information to extrapolate nationwide STI cases from sentinel reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national infectious-disease estimation from sentinel surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an EHR-based sentinel surveillance population and reports screening positivity, but does not actually perform or evaluate inference calibration from sentinel data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The abstract supports sentinel-system development, not this exact inference-and-calibration concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether labor-and-delivery patients are representative sentinels for estimating SARS-CoV-2 prevalence and equity patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct assessment of a sentinel population's suitability for broader prevalence inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates HIV sentinel surveillance estimates against PPTCT programme data using prevalence comparisons, correlations, and agreement statistics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Directly assesses sentinel-data validity for tracking HIV trends.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks SARS-CoV-2 positivity from eight influenza sentinel sites against universal national surveillance and quantifies their correlation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Validates a sentinel platform against national surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares national sentinel case-count indicators with hospital test counts, cases, and positivity to assess national monitoring performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Evaluates concordance and timing of alternative indicators used to interpret sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a statistical model using prior universal reporting to estimate age-specific scaling factors and reconstruct case counts from sentinel reports.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit modeling study for calibrated reconstruction of national case counts from sentinel data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a Bayesian model to extrapolate COVID-NET sentinel hospitalization rates nationally while estimating multiple sources of uncertainty.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal for national inference from sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares Bangladesh influenza-sentinel SARS-CoV-2 trends and variants with the national platform to evaluate alignment and monitoring utility.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of sentinel monitoring against national surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the feasibility of a real-time electronic pertussis sentinel system and identifies sample-collection barriers requiring staff training.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit feasibility evaluation of sentinel-system design and operation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates a sentinel system's sensitivity, specificity, predictive value, representativeness, timeliness, acceptability, and other attributes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal performance evaluation of a sentinel surveillance system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates China's national HIV sentinel system using standard surveillance attributes and identifies operational and representativeness problems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal national sentinel-system evaluation.
named_source_mentions: Updated Guidelines for Evaluating Public Health Surveillance Systems

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides guidelines and robust methods for assessing whether routine PMTCT data are suitable to replace traditional antenatal HIV sentinel data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guidance document defining assessment methods and readiness standards for sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes site selection, enrollment, specimen testing, and weekly reporting used to establish ILI sentinel surveillance in Togo.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete implementation account of an influenza sentinel system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes enhancement of Senegal's sentinel network through expanded geographic coverage, integrated syndromic reporting, mobile transmission, and broader virological testing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel-network improvement and implementation report.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the ICU USII sentinel system's predictive value, timeliness, acceptability, and sensitivity after its operational period.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal evaluation of an implemented sentinel surveillance model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel facilities as sites for evaluating STI clinical service quality; it does not evaluate or design the surveillance system itself.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The surveillance setting is incidental to the clinical-quality evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses the feasibility and demonstrated utility of a regional sentinel network for vaccine impact, effectiveness, and safety monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit feasibility assessment of expanded sentinel-platform functions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes implementation and operation of outpatient ILI and inpatient SARI sentinel systems in Georgia, including sites, sampling, and detection results.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel-system implementation report.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes building laboratory-based arbovirus sentinel surveillance through systematic testing, improved forms, and linked data management.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete capacity-building and implementation account.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports practical enhancement of cholera sentinel surveillance and lessons concerning early warning, diagnosis, and field investigation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete implementation and enhancement experience.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates Ghana's ILI sentinel system against objectives and attributes, identifying incomplete objectives and suboptimal data quality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal performance evaluation with system-specific recommendations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares pilot sentinel findings with the existing HFMD system and assesses feasibility, advantages, limitations, and factors affecting positivity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct feasibility and performance assessment of a pilot sentinel system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates eight attributes of the DRC influenza sentinel system and grades its performance, reliability, and weaknesses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal multi-attribute sentinel-system evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates nine performance attributes of Zambia's influenza sentinel system and identifies representativeness, timeliness, and sustainability weaknesses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal multi-attribute evaluation of sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses site preparedness and adherence to HIV sentinel-surveillance procedures across antenatal clinics in India.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of implementation quality at sentinel sites.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews achievements, opportunities, and challenges of two national active hospital surveillance networks and discusses transfer of their model to other contexts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides explicit evaluative guidance on the strengths, limitations, and applicability of sentinel-network design.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes establishment, data extraction, reporting, governance, and coverage of the ATLAS STI and BBV sentinel network.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national sentinel-network implementation report.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses mixed methods and standard attributes to evaluate the usefulness and performance of Yemen's SARI sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal sentinel-system performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates reporting compliance, facility distribution, representativeness, and extrapolation performance of South Africa's STI clinical sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation with recommendations for system redesign.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively evaluates timeliness, stability, completeness, sensitivity, and representativeness of South Korea's HFMD sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal sentinel-system performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares a new hospital-laboratory platform with existing systems and evaluates its capabilities against WHO mosaic-framework objectives.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance and framework-fit evaluation of a surveillance platform.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates timeliness, completeness, sensitivity, and representativeness of South Korea's ILI sentinel system before, during, and after the pandemic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal longitudinal sentinel-system evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates ten attributes and 57 indicators across Ethiopia's ILI/SARI sentinel sites and grades overall system performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal multi-attribute sentinel-system evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates Mozambique's influenza sentinel system for quality, stability, sensitivity, representativeness, timeliness, and predictive value.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal performance evaluation of sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures predictive value and sensitivity, documents false and underreporting, and assesses whether Japan's MDRP sentinel system captures the true trend.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of sentinel-system reporting performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses sensitivity and geographic representativeness of Korea's respiratory sentinel system against claims and population-based benchmarks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of sentinel-system adequacy and future development needs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes establishment, linkage methods, participating sites, data completeness, and early operation of a BBV/STI sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete implementation account for a linked sentinel surveillance system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates the first implementation stage of ACCESS, including site coverage, completeness, extraction delays, and operational potential.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit early-stage implementation evaluation of a national sentinel system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes implementation and demonstrated feasibility of low-cost, encrypted-SMS reporting for Madagascar's real-time ILI sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete technology-enabled sentinel-system implementation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes establishment and operation of the Respiratory DataMart sentinel system, including systematic laboratory collection and near-real-time reporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete implementation of a new laboratory-based sentinel platform.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes establishing ten malaria sentinel sites, SMS reporting, data use, operational challenges, and lessons learned in Ethiopia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel-system implementation and operations account.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Documents how seven primary-care influenza sentinel sites adapted pathways, testing, and data collection for COVID-19 surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Multicountry implementation account of sentinel-system adaptation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the interdisciplinary informatics roles, structures, processes, and scaling required to operate the RSC sentinel system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete operational implementation account for a mature sentinel network.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Successfully integrates SARS-CoV-2 testing and COVID-19 response data into acute-febrile-illness sentinel systems in five countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multicountry adaptation and implementation of sentinel surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes Egypt's adaptation of integrated ARI sentinel surveillance to COVID-19 enrollment, testing, and reporting requirements.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete implementation of a pandemic-driven sentinel-system adaptation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots enhanced sentinel data collection across seven clinics to monitor hepatitis treatment eligibility, uptake, and outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pilot implementation of a sentinel monitoring system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes adapting an influenza sentinel system to comprehensive ARI surveillance using EHR extraction, standardized microbiology, and epidemic thresholds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological implementation of an expanded sentinel network.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, deploys, and evaluates OSSS-Isa, specifying sites, weekly reporting, alerts, and measured system attributes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Complete implementation account for a novel local sentinel system.
named_source_mentions: updated guidelines for evaluating public health surveillance systems

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements automated study recruitment within an existing sentinel network but does not implement or evaluate the surveillance system itself.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The sentinel network is the recruitment setting rather than the evaluated implementation concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a test-negative incident case-control study based on Canadian sentinel physician surveillance to estimate pandemic H1N1 vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a test-negative case-control study among patients tested through a sentinel GP network to estimate influenza vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses influenza-positive sentinel patients as cases and test-negative patients as controls to estimate component-specific vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses seven sentinel networks and compares laboratory-confirmed influenza cases with negative controls to estimate early vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multicentre sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates vaccine effectiveness in a sentinel platform by comparing vaccination odds in influenza-positive cases and test-negative controls.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete integrated sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Canada's sentinel network and a test-negative case-control design to estimate interim A(H3N2) vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a test-negative case-control study across five European sentinel networks to estimate vaccine effectiveness by influenza type.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multicentre sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Canada's sentinel network and a test-negative case-control design to estimate interim A(H1N1)pdm09 vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Within an integrated sentinel platform, compares vaccination between influenza-positive cases and test-negative controls to estimate vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application integrated with virological characterization.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares screening-method estimates from passive data against test-negative estimates from sentinel participants and diagnoses reliability trade-offs and missing-data problems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct methodological performance assessment of sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a test-negative case-control design with Spanish sentinel data and compares its estimates with the cycEVA study.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application with cross-system comparison.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a sentinel clinic network, influenza-positive cases, and influenza-negative controls to estimate age-specific vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly applies a test-negative vaccine-effectiveness design, but the title and abstract do not identify the data collection as sentinel surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The sentinel component of the exact concept is unsupported by the inspected text.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly critiques the test-negative design and explains threats from confounding, selection bias, and exposure or outcome measurement error.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit causal-validity critique of the test-negative design used for vaccine effectiveness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an Australian hospital sentinel program with influenza-positive cases and test-negative controls to estimate vaccine effectiveness under repeated vaccination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital-sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses systematically sampled SARI sentinel cases and a test-negative design to estimate influenza A vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses national hospital sentinel data, influenza-positive cases, and test-negative controls to estimate vaccine effectiveness against mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital-sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a test-negative case-control study nested in an English primary-care sentinel network using point-of-care influenza tests.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a test-negative design with SARI admissions reported through Spain's sentinel hospital network to estimate COVID-19 vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital-sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a multistate sentinel hospital network and test-negative design to estimate influenza vaccine effectiveness and assess control-selection bias.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an active hospital sentinel system with pertussis-positive cases and Bordetella-negative controls to estimate dose-specific vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Embeds a test-negative case-control analysis in active sentinel surveillance to estimate rotavirus vaccine effectiveness and impact.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a test-negative case-control study using South African pneumonia sentinel surveillance to estimate COVID-19 vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a test-negative case-control design with primary-care and hospital sentinel data to estimate childhood influenza vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports vaccine-effectiveness estimates from sentinel surveillance, but the title and abstract do not identify a test-negative design or equivalent case-control sampling.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The test-negative component of the exact concept is unsupported by the inspected text.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a multicentre test-negative case-control study using hospital sentinel surveillance to estimate RSV vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital-sentinel test-negative vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a calibration model to EHR surveillance indicators and measures its reduction of prevalence-estimate bias caused by misclassification.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Evaluates calibration performance for correcting surveillance measurement error.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a nested serosurvey to validate vaccination-coverage estimates, revealing immunity gaps and likely underreporting of vaccination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of surveillance-related coverage ascertainment using serological measurements.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a spatial Bayesian hierarchical model that links active and passive surveillance to correct under-ascertainment and estimate disease prevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development paper for surveillance bias correction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies extreme bias from applying aggregate NREVSS positivity to correct RSV under-ascertainment across heterogeneous patient groups.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of the validity and performance of an ascertainment correction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a doubly robust estimator combining selection propensities and forecast models to correct measurement error and selection bias in case counts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development paper for bias-corrected surveillance estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a published standardization-based adjustment for age- and sex-specific under-testing to reconstruct SARS-CoV-2 case incidence in Ontario.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of surveillance ascertainment correction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates laboratory, hospital, death-registry, and notification data to reconstruct melioidosis incidence and mortality and quantify severe underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease burden reconstruction from multiple routine data sources.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a two-distribution time-series mixture model to detect and quantify underreporting and reconstruct genital-warts burden.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development paper for underreporting estimation and burden reconstruction.
